Description:
Ballistics of the WB126 APFSDS-T rounds fired from the Type 71 120mm smoothbore tank gun. Projectiles either of Tungsten-core-steel-sheath, or steel rod construction. Projectiles weigh 4.3 kg.

Charge:			8.4 kg 
Muzzle Velocity:			>1580 m/s
Cartridge Length:			790 mm

Web ratio adjusted to more accurately model behavior of mixed charge.

References:

- 《火炸药手册（增订本）第二分册 固体火箭推进剂和枪炮发射药》presents an alternative interpretation, noting 8.4 kg (9/7 + 18/1 + 12/1 Rosium-Potassium) charge and developing 3280 kgf/cm^2 (copper crusher gauge value, converts to 360.2 MPa piezoelectric with factor of 1.12 * 0.098) peak breech pressure.

Entry reflects compromise between sources that reflects gun design best practices, with liberty taken on web ratio and mass ratio between main and auxiliary charge grains.
